overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player exiting a building into the foggy night streets of Saint Denis, walking past historic storefronts under covered walkways, and entering a secluded courtyard. The scene features atmospheric gas lighting, cobblestone streets, and period architecture with a horse rider passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate interior hallway with oil paintings and wood paneling

events.description: character opens double doors and begins to exit the building

agents.ego_description: walking through an ornate hallway toward the exit doors and opening them to go outside

entered.detail: decorative carpet with intricate patterns covering the floor
dark wood paneled walls with decorative trim
framed oil paintings hanging on the walls
large wooden double doors with glass panels leading outside
red velvet rope on brass stanchions
warm glowing wall-mounted light fixtures

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an ornate interior hallway featuring decorative carpet, wood paneling, and oil paintings. Warm wall sconces illuminate the space as the character approaches and opens a set of double glass doors to exit the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy historic city street with grand hotel building

events.description: exits building into the foggy night street
rider on horseback passes by from left to right

agents.ego_description: stepping out onto the street and observing the surroundings including a passing horse rider

notable_agents.action: riding a horse along the cobblestone street, passing by the camera from left to right

entered.detail: large multi-story historic building with illuminated windows and signage
tall cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light
wet cobblestone road surface reflecting the street lights
leafless trees lining the street
wooden post for tying horses

segments.scene_description: Stepping out into a foggy night, the scene reveals a historic cobblestone street lined with bare trees and dominated by a grand hotel building across the way. A rider on horseback passes by from left to right, illuminated by the warm glow of street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with historic storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past various shop fronts under the awning

entered.detail: overhead wooden awning covering the sidewalk
wooden storefront with glass windows and signage
brick storefront with painted signage reading AMERICA SAVINGS
cast iron columns supporting the overhead awning
elevated wooden plank walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along a covered pedestrian walkway with wooden decking, passing historic storefronts including one labeled 'TRUAX' and another with 'AMERICA SAVINGS' signage. The overhead awning provides shelter while street lamps cast long shadows on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with newspaper building and gated entrance

events.description: turns right and enters through an iron gate into a walled courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking past the Saint Denis Times building and approaching the iron gate to the courtyard

notable_agents.action: two men standing and conversing near the corner of the building

entered.detail: building with large signage reading 'Saint Denis Times'
decorative lights strung across the street
wrought iron gate entrance to the courtyard
high stone walls surrounding the courtyard entrance

segments.scene_description: Passing the 'Saint Denis Times' newspaper building, the camera approaches a street corner where two men stand conversing. The character turns right toward an iron gate entrance, passing under decorative string lights before entering the walled courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed courtyard with exterior stairs and potted plants

agents.ego_description: entering the courtyard and ascending the exterior stairs while looking around the enclosed space

entered.detail: stone staircase leading up to the next level
large planters with red leafy plants
ornate wall-mounted lanterns illuminating the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Inside the enclosed courtyard, the camera ascends exterior stone stairs flanked by potted plants and illuminated by wall-mounted lanterns. The space is narrow and private, with high stone walls surrounding the area and the iron gate now visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a warm, ornate interior into the foggy, gas-lit streets of a historic city, eventually ending in a secluded stone courtyard. It begins by gliding through a wood-paneled hallway adorned with oil paintings before passing through double glass doors into the cool, misty night. As the camera emerges onto the cobblestone street, it captures a rider on horseback passing beneath the glow of street lamps and the silhouette of a grand hotel. The movement then proceeds along a covered pedestrian walkway, passing the signage of historic storefronts and the Saint Denis Times building before turning right past two conversing men. Finally, the camera passes under decorative string lights and through an iron gate, ascending stone stairs flanked by potted plants within the privacy of a high-walled courtyard.
